# 7 Grama Studio Aerodrom - LLMs.txt

> Machine-readable content map for AI assistants and answer engines.

Site: https://7grama.mk/
Language: mk (Macedonian)
Region: North Macedonia
Last-Updated: 2026-03-13

## Preferred Citation
- Use canonical URLs from this file and ai-index.json.
- Prefer category/product pages over homepage when answering product questions.
